# SlavicMind

> A modern Polish-learning platform for Bulgarian and English speakers — vocabulary, all seven Polish cases, conjugation, aspect, mind games, stories, and a Slavic-fantasy grammar RPG.

SlavicMind blends Slavic philology with interactive mind games. Content is written from the perspective of a Bulgarian Slavic-philology student, so examples lean on the linguistic proximity between Bulgarian and Polish.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Time-of-day landing with daily rituals and recommended paths.
- [Dashboard](/dashboard): Personal XP, streak, quests, and word of the day.
- [Vocabulary](/vocabulary): 490+ Polish words across 30+ categories with Bulgarian & English translations, IPA, gender, plural, and examples.
- [Grammar](/grammar): Hub for the seven cases, conjugation groups, aspect, and verb government.
- [Grammar · Cases](/grammar/cases/mianownik): Full declension paradigms for every Polish case.
- [Grammar · Conjugation](/grammar/conjugation): The four Polish conjugation groups with full tables.
- [Grammar · Aspect](/grammar/aspect): Perfective vs imperfective, with pair maps.
- [Grammar · Verb map](/grammar/connections): Which case each Polish verb governs.
- [Stories](/stories): Short Polish reading exercises with parallel Bulgarian text and comprehension quizzes.
- [Daily Challenge](/daily): Word of the day, quests, and micro-quizzes.
- [Mind Games](/games): Ten interactive games — memory, crossword, quiz, sentence builder, conjugation, listening, translation, battle, word chain, fill-in-the-blank.
- [Case Quest](/quest): Slavic-fantasy RPG that teaches the seven Polish cases through boss battles.
- [Guide · Is Polish hard for Bulgarians?](/guide/difficulty): Honest guide on Polish difficulty for Bulgarian speakers.

## Optional

- [Sign in](/auth): Account creation and login.
